description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a brick exterior and a prominent gable roof over the garage. The front facade features large bay windows and a double garage door, with a paved driveway leading up to the entrance. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a green lawn in front and a fenced backyard that includes a patio or hot tub area. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and bay patterns, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is set beneath a covered porch, offering shelter and a welcoming appearance. The overall design is reminiscent of modern American suburban homes, blending traditional and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A two-story brick suburban house with a gable roof, bay windows, double garage, and fenced backyard with patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, bay windows, and green lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, garage side wall, and backyard patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, patio or hot tub, and back windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brick wall, side windows, and driveway leading to the garage.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with a single main door, steps, and overhanging gable roof
